archetypes.name: Izzet Prowess
archetypes.notes: Aggro-tempo spellslinger; prowess/magecraft creatures grow off cheap noncreature spells. Field-defining; assume game 1.

archetypes.name: Mono-Green Landfall
archetypes.notes: Landfall payoffs plus ramp into wide/tall green threats. Vulnerable to sweepers.

archetypes.name: Dimir Excruciator
archetypes.notes: Discard + removal control with card-advantage finishers. Grinds out fair decks.

archetypes.name: Izzet Spellementals
archetypes.notes: Combo-tempo using spell-made Elemental tokens as a board-building engine.

archetypes.name: Izzet Lessons
archetypes.notes: Control-combo leveraging the Learn/Lesson toolbox for flexible answers.

archetypes.name: Reanimator
archetypes.notes: Discard/mill a fatty, then cheat it onto the battlefield. Soft to graveyard hate.

archetypes.name: Azorius Prison
archetypes.notes: Tax/lock pieces plus sweepers; wins slowly behind a single resilient threat.

archetypes.name: Other / Rogue
archetypes.notes: Aggregate bucket for the long tail of sub-3% decks (Mono-Red Aggro, Azorius Momo, Selesnya Ouroboroid, 5c Elementals, brews, etc.). Not a single deck; do not classify against it.
